component.name: Bottom Sheet: Quick Capture
component.description: Modal-style bottom sheet opened from the FAB: drag handle, Title-H3 heading, and a 2×3 grid of Action Tile instances for session, notes, media, and materials.

grid.note: Figma uses 10px gutters; no Spacing/10 token in repo—code uses literal 10 for parity.

codeProps.title: optional; default Quick Capture
codeProps.onAction: optional (kind: ActionTileKind) => void; fired when a tile is activated

notes: 2026-04-07: Figma frame uses Action Tile masters; grid matches row-major order above. In Figma, consider binding the 10px grid gap to a variable if Spacing/10 is added to the library.
Pull handle + title + grid spacing implemented with flex gaps to approximate Figma absolute positions (handle top 24, heading ~62, grid ~108).
